text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Heading home after a day out, Manhattan Cafe
and I reach the academy gates when...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Would you like some coffee after this?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: There's a roast I'd really like you to try...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Come with me... and follow very closely.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe takes me to her own private
space on the academy grounds.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Here's the roast I mentioned...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe gestures to a transparent glass
jar with some unground coffee beans inside.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
These beans are from my coffee plant... I roasted
them myself...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: It takes around... three years for it to bear fruit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
And you can only harvest the cherries once a
year...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These are from the coffee plant she grew herself.
With all the hard work she put into harvesting
them, they're practically priceless.
choice_data_list:
...You really don't mind me drinking such
precious coffee?

...You really don't mind me drinking such
precious coffee?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...It's because it's precious that I want you to try
it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I roasted the beans to suit your tastes... I think
you'll like it.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: So...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Let's have some, together.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'll brew it right away... Please wait a moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sounds of Manhattan Cafe brewing the
coffee echo quietly throughout the room...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
My parents grow their own plants as well... Once a
year, we get together and enjoy the coffee...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Our yearly custom always reminds me of a
moonlit night... Kind and comforting...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I wanted you to experience that too...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Thank you for waiting. Here you are.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a sip of the freshly brewed coffee. The
flavor and warmth seep through my body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sit with Manhattan Cafe for a while as we both
savor the coffee in silence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We finish our drinks without saying a single word
to each other. Then, while the aftertaste still
lingers...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...How was it?
choice_data_list: I've never had coffee this delicious.
I've never had coffee this delicious.
Thank you for this wonderful experience.
I'd like to brew coffee for you sometime.
I'd like to brew coffee for you sometime.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...How was it?
choice_data_list: I've never had coffee this delicious.
I've never had coffee this delicious.
Thank you for this wonderful experience.
I'd like to brew coffee for you sometime.
I'd like to brew coffee for you sometime.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...You're exaggerating.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I feel the same way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time I spent enjoying the coffee tonight was
richer than a thousand words could describe. I
feel like its taste will stay with me forever.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...No, thank you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm truly grateful...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Would...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Would you mind... if we met up next year...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: And had coffee together again?
choice_data_list:
Let's meet up next year, and the year after that,
too.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Right.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Next year... and the year after that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I enjoy the rest of the evening while wondering
what the coffee we share next year will taste like.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: In that case...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: How about growing a coffee plant with me?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It'll take more than three years for it to fully
grow, but...
choice_data_list: The anticipation will motivate me to work hard.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Well, even if that day won't come for quite some
time...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to it too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The coffee we have then will taste better than
today's. I just know it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, the two of us spend some time
picturing an even richer and more aromatic
future.
